configurations.name: with_skill (v2.0)
configurations.description: New brainstorm skill with triage + 3 modes

analyst_observations: v2.0 achieves 100% assertion pass rate vs 50% for v1.2 — all three modes work correctly
Triage correctly classified all 3 test cases: Explore (side project), Focused (AWS cost), Prompt (landing page)
Question count dropped 66%: avg 4.3 questions (v2.0) vs 12.7 (v1.2) — massive UX improvement
AWS cost reduction improved most dramatically: 2 questions + direct strategies (v2.0) vs 12 questions + Improved Prompt output (v1.2)
Side project: v2.0 gave 7 ideas after 3 questions + went deeper on user's pick; v1.2 asked 13 questions and only produced an Improved Prompt
Landing page (prompt improvement): both versions produce good prompts, but v2.0 does it in 6 questions vs 13
Token usage is slightly lower (-3.7%) despite v2.0 producing richer outputs (ideas, strategies) — efficiency gains from fewer questions
Mode transitions work smoothly — side project Explore→Focused transition carried forward all context without re-asking
